reviews.comment:
Muy mala idea de dejar los baños cerrado de noche...llene el tanque de mí vehículo y ni así pide usarlo pq no dejan llaves...una falta de respeto.. para los que venimos viajando

(Translated by Google)
A very bad idea to leave the bathrooms closed at night... I filled up my vehicle's tank and he still didn't ask to use it because they didn't leave keys... a lack of respect for those of us who are traveling.
